nasb.text: for you have not as yet come to the resting place and the inheritance which the Lord your God is giving you.

esv.text: for you have not as yet come to the rest and to the inheritance that the Lord your God is giving you.

cnv.text: 因為你們現在還沒有到耶和華你的　神賜給你的安息地和產業。

ccb.text: 因为到如今你们还没有进入你们的上帝耶和华赐给你们作产业的安歇之地。
